name: All That Glitters
description_short: All That Glitters is a pawn shop in Portland, OR offering jewelry, firearms, electronics, tools, and sporting goods with layaway options and competitive pricing.
description_long:
All That Glitters operates as a pawn shop located at 12200 SE Division St in Portland, Oregon's Multnomah County. The business positions itself as a premier destination for both buying and pawning collateral-based loans, operating under the pawn-shops consumer finance category. The company maintains extended hours (10 AM–7 PM weekdays, 10 AM–7 PM Saturdays, 11 AM–5 PM Sundays) to serve the local community.

The business offers a diverse inventory spanning jewelry, firearms, electronics, tools, and sporting goods, alongside used and vintage consignment items. According to their business description, they provide layaway options that offer flexibility for customers seeking to purchase items over time. The company emphasizes fair pricing and honest appraisals as core service offerings. Staff members are highlighted by name (Opal, Aubrey, Audrey, and Erin) for their professionalism and customer service approach.

All That Glitters differentiates itself through a visually organized store layout designed to enhance the shopping experience. Aggregated customer reviews praise the welcoming atmosphere, personalized service, diverse jewelry collection, and value-oriented pricing. The business claims to provide a stress-free experience and positions repeat customer satisfaction as a key metric of success. The store's emphasis on staff friendliness and product variety appears intentional in their market positioning.

However, the business listing shows zero verified reviews despite being listed on Wheree, indicating limited third-party validation of claims. The business owner has not completed verification on the platform. Some aggregated feedback mentions perception of high prices for non-promoted items, suggesting pricing may not be universally competitive. As a pawn shop, the business model inherently involves collateral-based lending practices, which carry the standard risks and regulatory considerations of the pawn industry.
pros: Extended operating hours (10 AM–7 PM most days) with weekend availability
Diverse inventory across jewelry, firearms, electronics, tools, and sporting goods
Layaway payment options providing purchase flexibility over time
Staff named specifically (Audrey, Erin, Opal) for friendly and attentive customer service
Claims to provide honest appraisals and fair pricing
Clean, organized store layout facilitating easy navigation
Handles used and vintage consignment items
cons: Zero verified reviews on listing despite claims of customer satisfaction and repeat business
Business owner has not completed verification process on Wheree platform
Some customer feedback indicates pricing perceived as high when not actively promoted
Limited transparency on specific pawn loan terms, interest rates, or redemption policies
Aggregated reviews appear AI-generated rather than authentic customer testimonials
best_for: Individuals seeking collateral-based loans using jewelry, electronics, or other goods as security
Bargain hunters looking for used jewelry, vintage items, firearms, or electronics at discounted prices
Customers needing flexible payment options through layaway programs
diagnosis: All That Glitters is best suited for individuals needing quick collateral-based loans or seeking bargain purchases of jewelry, electronics, and tools in Portland. The primary caveat is the complete absence of verified customer reviews and unverified business information, making it difficult to independently validate service quality, actual pricing competitiveness, or loan terms before engaging with the business.
services: Pawn loans against firearms and sporting goods
Pawn loans against electronics and tools
